steps.name: Deploy PrivacyVault Contract
steps.decision: Deploy PrivacyVault to Base Sepolia — on-chain store for session proof hashes
steps.verification: Contract deployed and verified on BaseScan

steps.name: Private Treasury Strategy Reasoning
steps.decision: Analyze a sensitive treasury portfolio privately — hash input, reason in-memory, produce public-safe output only

params.sensitive_input_description: Portfolio data: $3.5M across ETH, stETH, USDC with 18-month runway

result.output_summary: Portfolio concentrated in volatile assets. Recommend reducing ETH exposure by 15%, increasing yield positions via stETH, maintaining 6-month USDC runway.
output_actions: Set rebalancing trigger at 10% portfolio drift

steps.name: Commit Treasury Strategy Proof On-Chain
steps.decision: Commit session hashes to PrivacyVault — proves computation happened without revealing data
steps.verification: Hash committed on-chain. Anyone can verify the computation proof without accessing the private data.

steps.name: Private Governance Deliberation
steps.decision: Analyze governance proposal privately — evaluate impact and risks without exposing deliberation

params.sensitive_input_description: Proposal #47: Increase validator set from 30 to 50 nodes. Voting data and stakeholder positions included.

result.output_summary: Proposal has merit but introduces centralization risk at 50 nodes without proportional security budget increase. Recommend conditional support.
output_actions: Require security budget increase proportional to node count
Add 90-day review period for validator performance
Flag centralization risk in public comment

steps.name: Commit Governance Deliberation Proof On-Chain
steps.decision: Commit governance session proof to PrivacyVault

steps.name: Private Deal Evaluation
steps.decision: Evaluate confidential deal terms privately — sensitive valuation and counterparty data must not leak

params.sensitive_input_description: Term sheet for Series B: $15M at $80M pre-money. Counterparty track record and comparable deal data included.

result.output_summary: Valuation is 12% above comparable deals in current market. Terms are acceptable with haircut and milestone vesting adjustments.

retry.reason: Venice API returned 503 on first attempt (temporary overload)
retry.recovery: Retried after 3s, succeeded on second call

self_correction.trigger: Venice API returned 503 on first attempt
self_correction.correction: Implemented exponential backoff retry. On failure, agent would fall back to local reasoning (no API, no network call) to preserve privacy guarantee.
self_correction.outcome: Retry succeeded. Logged fallback path for future resilience.

steps.name: Commit Deal Evaluation Proof On-Chain
steps.decision: Commit deal evaluation session proof to PrivacyVault

steps.name: Verify All Sessions On-Chain
steps.decision: Verify each committed session hash matches what we computed off-chain — proves integrity of the pipeline
steps.verification: All 3 sessions verified on-chain. Hash chain integrity confirmed — computation proofs match committed values.

steps.name: Final Session Count Verification
steps.decision: Query total session count to confirm all 3 sessions are committed
steps.verification: 3/3 private reasoning sessions committed and verified on-chain. Zero sensitive data exposed.

retries.error: Venice API returned 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable
retries.resolution: Waited 3s, retried, succeeded on attempt 2. Fallback path (local reasoning) was prepared but not needed.

self_corrections.trigger: Venice API 503 on first call during deal evaluation
self_corrections.correction: Implemented retry with exponential backoff. Prepared local reasoning fallback (hashlib-only, no network) to maintain privacy guarantee even if Venice is fully unavailable.
self_corrections.outcome: Retry succeeded. Fallback path documented for production hardening.

final_outputs.privacy_guarantee: All 3 sessions: input hashed (SHA-256), reasoning in-memory only, output public-safe, proofs committed on-chain
use_cases_demonstrated: Treasury strategy (portfolio rebalancing without exposing balances)
Governance deliberation (proposal analysis without exposing voting positions)
Deal evaluation (term sheet analysis without exposing valuations)
